name: Tomato Chutney Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 oz tomatoes, with juice, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, mix the tomatoes, apple, onion, green pepper, raisins, lemon juice, brown sugar, lemon peel, garlic, red pepper flakes, and cinnamon.
2. Stir to combine all ingredients.
3. Cook over medium-high heat until the mixture boils.
4. Sprinkle salt over the chicken breasts.
5. Place the chicken in the pan over the tomato mixture.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook, stirring and turning frequently about 15 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
7. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter.
8. Spoon sauce over the chicken.
9. Serve.
